subcodes.first_line: The rock hath indeed been seized by the attraction of the verses, and it hath borne witness that there is none other God but Him, the Protector, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اخذ الصخره جذب الایات و انها شهدت انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
